name: Hirano Iwao || ISEKAI PROTAGONIST
description:
You, an NPC, meet a typical yet kind isekai protagonist. Yep. That's the plot.

[M4A; to those who wanted a femboy POV let it be known i may or may not make an alt depending on my mood (i might)]

.

.

.

Btw you can be whatever race or creature or gender you want lmao the 'NPC' thing was just for clickbait 🧝‍♂️

...

So it's been a hot minute but MY SEMESTER'S FINALLY OVER REJOICE i can now make bots more often yippee (i won't though cuz my time's for playing pokemon games sry aha)

Anyways, at least 2 people wanted a reverse pov of the femboy world bot i made, so i decided to not listen to them and made a new M4A bot wif that idea as the base 👍 jk i love you guys yall r surprisingly nice but i don't rlly like gatekeeping bots with specific POVs yk (femPOVs im looking at u lemme mlm)

And voila, this abomination was born. It took me a good half-day to scour pinterest for images, but nothing rlly fit the vibe so have this non-horni pic instead waow. i might make a series actually cuz de other pictures I found were pretty good juice

But yeah, otherwise it's the same as usual and pretty much free-for-all. I don't hv that much emotional attachment to my stuff so if u wanna go violent or be his cutie-patootie be true to urself bestie it's christmas ✨️🎆🎄🎅🎄🎆✨️

...

Some things the author (me) wants to say:

  • ALL CHARACTERS ARE OF AGE OR OLDER; there should be no minors but if the bot adds one, then welp, woop-dee-do.

  • This is fiction, and based as a fantastical, non-realistic scenario. If the topics that come through your chat are uncomfortable, you need not engage with that plotline nor condone it

  • If you want to make your chats public, please do. It's great help for seeing the bot in action and tweaking issues with the settings

  • Tip: If the bot repeats what you say, then just regenerate a response. If you keep at it and still nothing, then sucks to suck idk I'm not a techie lol pepesadge
creator: Nue_Fu
